title: BEM-868 broaden final filter
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 12:44 (UTC+3)'
def read(p):
    p=Path(p)
    return p.read_text(errors='ignore') if p.exists() else ''
real=[]; blockers=[]
d=Path('governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt')
if d.exists():
    for p in sorted(d.glob('*')):
        if p.is_file():
            txt=read(p); up=txt.upper(); low=(p.name+' '+txt).lower()
            bad='NOT CLAUDE APPROVAL' in up or 'RUNTIME BLOCKER' in up or 'not treat this as claude' in low
            ok=('DECISION:' in up and ('APPROVED' in up or 'CHANGE_REQUIRED' in up or 'BLOCKED' in up) and ('CLAUDE RESPONSE' in up or 'Claude Internal Auditor' in txt))
            item={'path':str(p),'preview':txt[:1500]}
            if bad: blockers.append(item)
            elif ok: real.append(item)
if real:
    txt=real[-1]['preview'].upper()
    if 'DECISION: APPROVED' in txt: decision='APPROVED'
    elif 'DECISION: CHANGE_REQUIRED' in txt: decision='CHANGE_REQUIRED'
    elif 'DECISION: BLOCKED' in txt: decision='BLOCKED'
    else: decision='UNKNOWN'
else:
    decision='MISSING'
if decision=='APPROVED':
    status='broad_final_filter_approved'
    next_action='mark final protocol approved and resume roadmap'
elif decision in ['CHANGE_REQUIRED','BLOCKED']:
    status='broad_final_filter_not_approved'
    next_action='extract latest response changes and patch again'
else:
    status='broad_final_filter_no_usable_response'
    next_action='repair Claude final response dispatch or response format'
state={'bem':'BEM-868','status':status,'decision':decision,'real_response_count':len(real),'latest_real':real[-1:] if real else [],'blocker_count':len(blockers),'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem868_broaden_final_response_filter.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem868_broaden_final_response_filter.md').write_text('# BEM-868 | Broaden Final Response Filter | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem868_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-868'+sep+sep+'Decision: '+decision+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend(['governance/state/bem868_broaden_final_response_filter.json','governance/reports/bem868_broaden_final_response_filter.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem868_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Broadened final approval response filter to all real Claude responses and selected next step')
"""
No issue comments.
